candidates.title: Brand-risk flag with clear cleanup action
candidates.text: A community member flags that a public spill created reputational risk and asks for cleanup rather than debate or spectacle.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord export for privacy. It condenses a real trust-risk and disclosure-risk cluster into a public-safe brand-risk pattern.

candidates.title: Repo review says the basis is real, not vapor
candidates.text: A reviewer looked at the public repository and called out beat tracking, onset, embeddings, alignment, VAD, and pipeline glue. The judgement was that it already had real bones and a legitimate basis rather than vapor, even if quality still needed inspection.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord export for privacy. It condenses a room review of the repository into a public-safe repo-review pattern.

candidates.title: Concrete community idea for turning chat lessons into better inputs
candidates.text: A community member proposes a technical document or ranked judgement board that helps other builders produce better inputs instead of letting lessons vanish into chat scroll.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from real Discord discussion for privacy. It condenses the room's concrete operating idea into a public-safe community-idea pattern.

candidates.title: Price prompt without any artifact path
candidates.text: A member asked whether the coin price would be moved soon. The message contains no document, no repository review, no clip, and no implementation detail.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord export for privacy. It condenses a short price-focused post into a public-safe price-chatter pattern.

candidates.title: Future-upside prompt without receipts
candidates.text: A member asked when the work would be visible soon, but gave no receipts, no artifact path, and no concrete next step.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord export for privacy. It condenses a hype-forward post into a public-safe vague-hype pattern.
